creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
I'm surprising this port would work alone since it requires binutils
2.9.1.0.23 or later and the base system binutils before 4.1 is too old.

a BUILD_DEPEND and/or something like OSVERSION >= 410000 are probably
required ?

Cyrille.
--
